title: Double Walled Vacuum Flask Thermo, 500ml Stainless Steel Insulated Water Bottle, Flask for Hot and Cold Drinks, Travel Coffee Mug, Sports Water Bottle, Drinks Cup (Black)
features: 【Safe Material & High Capacity】FAPPEN Double Walled Vacuum Flask Thermo is made of food upgrade 304 stainless steel on both inside and outside walls, 100% BPA-free, which works better on anti-oxidation, corrosion resistance and temperature retention; It is a healthier choice as water bottle for tea, coffee, cold drink with ice cubes, etc.

【Vacuum Insulated Water Bottle】Thanks to the premium coated copper on the exterior of the inner wall contributes to added insulation, This vacuum insulated drink flask can keep hot for 12 hours or cold for 9+ hours, greatly protect the liquid compartment from the hot or cold outside, achieving in reducing temperature transmission in maximum

【Leak Proof & Sweat Free】Double lid locks of bottle and silicone rubbers ensure no leak even the water bottle is tipped over or shaken; Coated with high-quality powder outside, this drink flask is anti-slip andoutstanding insulation, no matter the temperature of the liquid in this bottle, it will never sweat or be hot to the touch

【Friendly Design for One-Hand Operation】This ergonomically shaped vacuum insulated bottle allows one-handed operation by briefly releasing and pressing the side button, fits most cup holders and makes a perfect travel companion; Especially suitable for drivers and students and perfectly suitable for daily use, running, hiking, and camping
【What You Get】 If you have any issue about Water Bottle, please do not hesitate to contact us, and we will help you very quickly
description: FAPPEN 500ml Double Walled Vacuum Flask Thermo - 100% Hygienic for adluts and kids, makes a perfect travel companion Feature: 1. 500ml capacity, 304 stainless steel and lightweight 2. Double Lid locks to prevent accidental spills, 100% leak proof 3. One - handed operation for on-the-go drinking, easy-flip press button lid and anti-hot sipping design 4. Fits for most car cup holders, perfect for cold and hot water, tea, coffee, carbonated drinks, wine and beer 5. Widely use at home, work, at the gym, for sports, in your car, at the beach and even camping, hiking, traveling Specification: Colour: Black/ Gold/ White/ Pink Capacity: 500ml/17.6Oz Meterial: 304 stainless steel Note: 1. Before using, it is recomended to wash it with warm water and a little neutral detergent, and rinse it with clean water 2. It is better not to contain something easy-expanded, like dry ice, to avoid burst and not to contain some liquids with high salt 3. Please do not add in hot water exceeding the sealing water neckline by cup mouth, in order to avoid soaking and scald 4. Please do not use it as one container to heat directly, and forbidden to put it in the microwave oven or dishwasher
